content_body:
2nd Story Entertainment is an indoor 18-hole mini-golf course inside a 100+ year old Hotel located on the 2nd Story, featuring grass-type putting surfaces with accurate golf holes. Eight different themed rooms run throughout our historic building, creating a challenging one-of-a-kind mini-golf experience.

Plus, enjoy a giant Connect 4, giant checkers, and a dart board during or after your round. Sodas, Water, and Ice Cream are available...fun for all and a terrific party Place!
title: 2nd Story Entertainment
